ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded during the day */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "pre_market_price" TEXT /* Price before the market opens */,
  "post_market_price" TEXT /* Price after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price for the day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of trading (e.g., open, closed, halted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock symbol information was updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporate_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporate action */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol affected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the corporate action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of corporate action (e.g., stock split, dividend) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the corporate action */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Factor of the corporate action (e.g., 2 for a 2-for-1 stock split) */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-date of the corporate action */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date for dividends or other actions */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the corporate action on the stock price (e.g., percentage change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporate_actions_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, analyst, admin) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client if the user is associated with one */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "portfolio_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the client's portfolio */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the client's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the client (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "performance_index" TEXT /* Performance index of the portfolio (e.g., return on investment) */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark index against which the portfolio is measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "position_size" TEXT /* Size of the position in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current price of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the stock position in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock position was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stock position (e.g., active, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "real_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data point */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the stock */,
  "change" TEXT /* Change in price since the last data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded at the given timestamp */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Current bid price of the stock */,
  "ask_price" TEXT /* Current ask price of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the real-time data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio analyzed in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "key_metrics" TEXT /* Key performance metrics included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set up the alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was set up */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" TEXT /* Relevance score of the news to the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the news item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
